stories: Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the eleventh of May, 2026
Fun fact: twenty-nine years ago today, IBM's Deep Blue defeated chess world champion Garry Kasparov — the first computer ever to beat a reigning world champion in a full match
The Mount Dukono story has moved from a search to a recovery
Rescue teams have located the bodies of the two missing Singaporean hikers near the crater rim, but continuous eruptions, flooding, and rain have halted retrieval operations
Both are confirmed dead, alongside a local guide
The seven surviving Singaporeans are heading home — a tragic end to a group that entered a restricted zone to create social media content
On a brighter note, Singapore's CPF could soon become a major driver of local equities
A new proposal would redirect fund savings into the stock market, with Citi estimating annual inflows of six to nine billion dollars

At ten, your Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead with Bob and Rehan on WebEx
